code: import React,{useState,useContext}from'react';import'./Login.css';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{LoginContext}from'../../context/LoginContext';import{toast}from'react-toastify';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Login=()=>{const{login}=useContext(LoginContext);const[email,setEmail]=useState('');const[senha,setSenha]=useState('');const navigate=useNavigate();const handleLogin=async e=>{e.preventDefault();try{const resposta=await fetch('https://localhost:3001/auth/login',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({email,senha})});const data=await resposta.json();if(!resposta.ok){toast.error(data.message||'Erro ao fazer login');return;}login(data.token);localStorage.setItem('token',data.token);navigate('/pilots');}catch(err){toast.error(err.message);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"loginDiv",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleLogin,className:"loginForm",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"email",placeholder:"E-mail",value:email,onChange:e=>setEmail(e.target.value),required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",placeholder:"Senha",value:senha,onChange:e=>setSenha(e.target.value),required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:"Entrar"})]})});};export default Login;
